skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.pre: Prevents Skyblock swords (e.g. Spirit Sceptre) from being placed as blocks while still allowing their abilities to activate.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.hid: Hides cheap coin ground drops (coin/coins player-head drops).
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.set: Set Kat Reminder for Pet Upgrades
Automatically create a reminder when Kat starts upgrading your pet so you get notified when it's ready to pick up.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.sho: Only Show Missing Enchantments When Pressing Shift

Only show missing enchantments when pressing Shift.
Setting this to false makes missing enchantments always visible.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ent:
Enter to Confirm Input Sign
(press Shift + Enter for new line)

Press Enter to finish sign editing on Hypixel input signs (AH and BZ).
Shift plus Enter always makes a new line like vanilla.
Apply Enter Confirm to All Signs
Ignores the Hypixel input sign check and applies Enter to confirm on every sign editor. Shift plus Enter always makes a new line.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Shows a glow outline on item drops near you.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.sho: Shows the glow outline even if the item is behind a block.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.def: Default color for the item glow outline. Use hex format like #RRGGBB.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Play a sound when a reminder is triggered.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rem:
Choose which sound to play for reminders.
Click to cycle through available sounds.

Adjust the volume of reminder sounds.
Range: 0.0 (silent) to 3.0

Adjust the pitch of reminder sounds.
Range: 0.5 (low) to 2.0 (high)
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.not: Notify When Pickaxe Ability is Ready
Shows a large on-screen title when your pickaxe ability cooldown finishes.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.pic: Play Sound on Pickaxe Ability Ready
Plays a short pling sound alongside the title notification.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Shows a colored highlight on the block you're mining that indicates the optimal moment to release the mining key, accounting for server ping and TPS.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.pin: Shows the highlight/outline when merely looking at a mineable block, before you start breaking it.
Renders a translucent colored fill on the targeted block.
Renders a wireframe outline around the targeted block.
When enabled, the overlay cycles red at 0-70%, yellow at 73-99%, then snaps to green at 100%. When disabled, it stays red until 100% then snaps directly to green with no middle color.
Color at the beginning of the mining progress (0%).
Color at the middle threshold of mining progress (85%).
Color when the block is ready to break (100%).
Renders the translucent highlight on all faces of the block.
Opacity of the block face highlight (0-100).

Adjusts when the overlay turns green relative to the predicted break time. Positive values delay the signal (if you switch too early). Negative values trigger it sooner (for slow reaction time). 0 for exact ping-only timing.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Transforms Hypixel storage GUIs into a unified, browsable dashboard with all cached pages visible at once.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.per: Saves captured storage pages to disk so they persist between game sessions.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.sto:
Number of storage pages displayed side by side in the overlay.
Range: 1-8

Height of the storage overlay in pixels.
Range: 100-600

How fast the storage overlay scrolls.
Range: 1-50
Inverts the scroll direction for the storage overlay.
Color used to highlight items matching a search query in the storage overlay.
Outline color for the currently selected storage page.
Border color for storage pages that are not currently selected.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena:
Enables integration with Reliable Recipe Viewer (RRV) to show SkyBlock recipes.
Requires RRV to be installed.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rep:
How often the NEU repo data is checked for refresh.
Range: 5-512 minutes
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.com: Shows a compact list of items in the recipe viewer.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena:
Logs detailed recipe diagnostics for debugging purposes.
Only useful for developers.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rrv:
Controls how the RRV item filter searches inventory slots.
Name and ID Only: checks item name and SkyBlock ID (fast).
Full Tooltip Search: also scans the entire tooltip text (slower, more matches).
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.hid: Hide Category Buttons When Not Searching
Hides the category filter buttons above the RRV search bar when no search text is entered.
Completely hides the category filter buttons above the RRV search bar.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.kee:
Keeps the bookmark/craftables side panel visible even when the search bar is empty.
Only applies when RRV is set to "Only visible when searching".
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.hid: Automatically hides the bookmarks side panel when it contains no bookmarks.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.wid: Forces the RRV search bar to be wider when in the item-list position.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rrv:
Minimum width of the RRV search bar in pixels.
Range: 100-300

Percentage of the available screen width used by the RRV item list panel.
100% fills the space between inventory and screen edge.
Lower values shrink the panel from the right side inward.

Percentage of the default width used by the RRV bookmarks/craftables side panel.
100% uses the normal calculated width.
Lower values shrink the panel inward.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.sho: Shows a red indicator and tooltip on crafting recipes that require a collection level or other condition to craft.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.big: Shows a large 'Craft' text button below the recipe instead of a small '+' icon next to the output slot.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rrv:
Which character to accept as the decimal separator in the search-bar calculator.
DOT = only '.'  |  COMMA = only ','  |  BOTH = accept either (rejects ambiguous numbers containing both).

When enabled, calculator results are rounded to the configured number of decimal places.
When disabled, values are truncated (not rounded) and trailing zeros are stripped.

Maximum number of decimal places shown in calculator results.
Range: 0-10.  Has no effect when the result is a whole number.

When enabled, shows the full raw number without K/M/B/T suffixes.
When disabled, only formats clean multiples (e.g., 10000 -> 10K, but 10001 -> 10001) to preserve accuracy.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ext: Increases the maximum number of chat messages kept in history beyond the default 100.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.cha:
Maximum number of chat messages stored in history.
Range: 100-2048
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.com: Collapses duplicate chat messages and shows a count badge instead.
Skips compacting for messages with clickable elements.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.onl: Only compact duplicate messages that appear consecutively.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.com:
Time window in which duplicate messages should be compacted.
Range: 0-60
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.cen: Centers text that Hypixel sends with spacing padding.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.smo: Uses smooth animated separators between chat sections.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Adds tabbed chat categories (All, Party, Guild, etc.).
Right-click on chat messages to open a context menu.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rig: Right-clicking a chat message copies it to the clipboard.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.alw: Keeps the chat search bar visible at all times.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Animates chat messages with a smooth slide-in effect.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.cha:
Duration of the chat slide-in animation in milliseconds.
Range: 50-500
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.sho: Shows enchantments that are missing from an item in its tooltip.
Highlights enchantments that are not at their maximum level.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Shows Bazaar and Auction House price information in item tooltips.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.pri:
How often price data is fetched from the API.
Range: 5-60
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Shows a scrolling ticker for price changes in tooltips.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rou: Rounds price values for cleaner display (e.g. 1.2M instead of 1,234,567).
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.sho: Shows separate buy and sell prices for Bazaar items.
Shows the spread (difference) between buy and sell prices on the Bazaar.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Allows scrolling through long item tooltips with the mouse wheel.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.anc: Anchors long tooltips to the top of the screen instead of the bottom.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.inv: Inverts the scroll direction for tooltips.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.noD: Prevents the sneak key from toggling twice when pressed once.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.dis: Disables the resource pack compatibility warning popup.
Skips the confirmation prompt for certain commands.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.hid: Hides item frame entities from rendering.
Suppresses texture loading error messages in the log.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Makes the game world fully bright regardless of light level.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ful: Uses gamma adjustment for fullbright instead of custom lighting.

Strength of the fullbright effect.
Range: 0-100
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.dev:
Enables developer-only tools and logging.
Auto-enabled in development environments.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.ena: Shows debug information about items on the ground nearby.
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.gro: Only show debug info for items within the configured radius.

Radius in blocks to scan for ground items when debugging.
Range: 4-64

How often to refresh ground item debug info, in ticks.
Range: 1-200
key.skyblock_enhancements.full_stack_pri: Show BZ Price for Full Stack
key.skyblock_enhancements.current_amount: Show BZ Price for Current Amount
skyblock_enhancements.midnightconfig.rrv: More options available in Skyblock Enhancements config -> Recipe Viewer Tab
skyblock_enhancements.recipe.not_found: This item (ID: %s) does not have a recipe.
